mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO b_outbound_order_item (outbound_order_id, material_id, material_code, material_name, specification_model, unit, request_quantity, approved_quantity, actual_quantity, unit_price, total_price, batch_no, storage_location, remark) VALUES
(#{item.outboundOrderId}, #{item.materialId}, #{item.materialCode}, #{item.materialName}, #{item.specificationModel}, #{item.unit}, #{item.requestQuantity}, #{item.approvedQuantity}, #{item.actualQuantity}, #{item.unitPrice}, #{item.totalPrice}, #{item.batchNo}, #{item.storageLocation}, #{item.remark})
